actionUnits.condition: OnTriggerEnter should fire when Player (fileID 7425022) overlaps Elevator's BoxCollider (id 1067963289, isTrigger=1). MonoBehaviour (component id 1067963293, script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77, class AttachToElevator) is attached with serialized field 'player' pointing to fileID 7425022. Expected behavior per script: player.transform.SetParent(Elevator.transform, true). Note: current code compares 'gameObject == player' (where gameObject is Elevator), so parenting will occur only if 'player' erroneously references the Elevator itself; otherwise no effect.

OnTriggerExit should fire when Player (fileID 7425022) leaves Elevator's BoxCollider (id 1067963289). MonoBehaviour (component id 1067963293, script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77, class AttachToElevator). Expected behavior per script: player.transform.parent = null. Note: due to 'gameObject == player' comparison, this will only execute if 'player' equals Elevator; otherwise no effect.
